results.rendered_html: amaryāda (von 3. a + maryādā) adj. keine Grenzen habend, alle Schranken überschreitend: tādṛśaṃ tvamamaryādaṃ karma kartuṃ cikīrṣasi  R. 2,35,11 . pradharṣitāyāṃ sītāyāṃ babhūva sacarācaram . jagatsarvamamaryādamandhena tamasā vṛtam .. 3,58,16 . nāmaryādaḥ kathaṃ ca na (rāmaḥ) 41,11 .

results.rendered_html:
amaryāda a. [na. ba.]
1 Exceeding due limits or bounds, transgressing every bound, disrespectful, improper; maryādāyāmamaryādāḥ striyastiṣṭhaṃti sarvadā  Pt. 1. 142 ; tādṛśaṃ tvamamaryādaṃ karma kartuṃ cikīrṣasi  Rām. 
2 Boundless, infinite.
— dā Transgression of due limits or bounds, impropriety of conduct, forwardness, disrespect, violation of due respect.
